description: The cblage CodeWhale client, powered by the CodeWhale engine
viewsContainers.secondarySidebar.title: 🦍 HarambeChat
views.chat.name: 🦍 HarambeChat
commands.openChat.title: CodeWhale (cblage): Open Chat
commands.newThread.title: CodeWhale (cblage): New Thread
commands.compactContext.title: CodeWhale (cblage): Compact Context
commands.restartEngine.title: CodeWhale (cblage): Restart Engine
config.enginePort.description: Port for the CodeWhale runtime API server
config.defaultMode.description: Default mode for new threads (agent, plan, or yolo)
config.reasoningEffort.description: Reasoning effort level (auto, off, low, medium, high, max)
config.autoStartEngine.description: Automatically start the CodeWhale engine when the extension activates
config.autoApprove.description: Auto-approve tool calls in agent mode (equivalent to trust mode / YOLO approval behavior)
config.showThreadList.description: Show the Threads tab in the sidebar. Legacy feature — threads are superseded by sessions.
config.showAgentToolCards.description: Show raw agent tool-call cards in the chat transcript. Subagent transcript cards remain visible.
config.autoWakeMasterForAgents.descripti: Periodically wake the master agent while subagents are active so it checks, recovers, or replaces workers that need attention. Watchdog turns can use model tokens.
config.agentWakeIntervalSeconds.descript: Seconds between automatic master-agent checks while subagents remain active (minimum 10).
